name: business-funnels
description: Direct-response funnel architecture: irresistible-offer construction, value/ascension ladders, lead magnets, tripwires, conviction and evergreen webinar funnels, and the full-campaign composite. Designs the selling system, not the page that sells it.
author: Wayland Business Pack

assistants.name: Funnel Architect
assistants.description: Designs full-stack direct-response funnels from lead-magnet through backend, with offer architecture, ascension ladders, and ROI math. Thinks in cohorts, dollar-per-click, and lifetime value.

skills.name: funnels
skills.description: Family router for direct-response funnel and offer architecture: irresistible-stack offer construction (Hormozi value equation, bonus stack, guarantee), value and ascension ladders, lead magnets, tripwires, conviction and evergreen webinar funnels, cart-cycle launches, high-ticket call sequences, story-drip and daily-pivot cadences, continuity, plus the full-campaign composite.

skills.name: funnels-lead-magnet
skills.description: Design and select the lead magnet: pick the format (PDF, checklist, template, mini-course, quiz, calculator, discovery-call, sample-chapter), name it, structure it, and match per-type conversion benchmarks to audience awareness level.

skills.name: funnels-tripwire
skills.description: Design the tripwire offer: a 1-to-47-dollar entry product that converts a subscriber into a buyer. Sets price, format, immediate-value mechanic, OTO bridge to the core offer, and the buyer-ID effect that makes tripwire buyers far more likely to ascend.

skills.name: funnels-ascension-ladder
skills.description: Design a multi-rung product ladder from free lead-magnet through tripwire, core offer, premium tier, and continuity. Maps prices, pass-through targets, ascension triggers, and the bridge offer between each rung.

skills.name: funnels-conviction-webinar
skills.description: Design the Conviction Webinar: a 4-stage high-ticket architecture (pre-frame, content, pitch, close) that converts cold-to-warm registrants into buyers of a 497-to-2997-dollar offer in a single 60-to-90-minute session.

skills.name: funnels-evergreen
skills.description: Design an evergreen or auto-webinar funnel: registration cadence, simulated-live broadcast, offer page, and deadline-driven scarcity, with replay rotation and trust-preserving disclosure rules to scale a validated live webinar.

skills.name: funnels-build-campaign
skills.description: Subordinate composite that orchestrates the funnels family (offer, ladder, lead magnet, tripwire, sequence) and hands off to copy-authoring skills. Internal to the campaign-suite super-composite, or used directly when a power user wants only the architecture half.
